message:
Deps: add lru and once_cell for search prefix caching

Add two crates required by the new search caching infrastructure:

- lru (wildcard): LRU cache implementation for prefix search results
  Used by SearchClient to maintain per-agent and global cache shards
  that store recent query results for instant prefix-match retrieval.

- once_cell (wildcard): Lazy static initialization without macros
  Used to read CASS_CACHE_SHARD_CAP and CASS_WARM_DEBOUNCE_MS env vars
  once at startup, allowing runtime tuning without recompilation.

Both dependencies are added to main dependencies (for lib) and
dev-dependencies (for tests that construct SearchClient directly).

These crates enable the search performance optimizations in query.rs:
- LRU shards provide O(1) cache lookups by query+filters fingerprint
- Lazy statics let operators tune cache size via environment variables
  without code changes (default: 256 entries per shard, 120ms debounce)

Part of P12 (Ultra-low-latency search v2) initiative.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -34,6 +34,7 @@ tantivy = "*"
 rayon = "*"
 crossbeam-channel = "*"
 parking_lot = "*"
+lru = "*"
 reqwest = { version = "*", default-features = false, features = ["json", "rustls-tls"] }
 ratatui = { version = "*", features = ["crossterm"] }
 crossterm = "*"
@@ -44,6 +45,7 @@ chrono = "*"
 semver = "*"
 tracing-appender = "*"
 strsim = "0.11.1"
+once_cell = "*"
 
 [build-dependencies]
 vergen = { version = "*", default-features = false, features = ["build", "cargo"] }
@@ -54,6 +56,7 @@ predicates = "*"
 tempfile = "*"
 insta = { version = "*", features = ["yaml", "json"] }
 criterion = "*"
+once_cell = "*"
 
 [[bin]]
 name = "cass"
